zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.pattern: Decimal arithmetic with ROUND_HALF_EVEN at the cent

factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.transfer_realization: ADR-T-001 (same pattern, income-tax-specific content + explicit citation of ADR-001 as parent)

factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.pattern: Product Tailoring Profile with surface_flags + risk_profile + methodology_blend
factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.wealth_com_realization: PRODUCT-TAILORING-WEALTHCOM-001 (6-method blend, 11 testing classes, 35 mandatory artifacts)
factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.transfer_realization: PRODUCT-TAILORING-TRANSFER-001 (1-method blend, 3 testing classes, 8 mandatory artifacts) — DIFFERENT, demonstrates per-archetype tailoring
factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.transfer_quality: STRONG — different blend depth proves the factory does NOT blanket-apply

factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.transfer_realization: ADR-T-002 explicitly NOT transferred, with rationale (single-user archetype)
factory_pattern_transfer_evidence.transfer_quality: CORRECT NON-TRANSFER — proves anti-overfit; documented as deliberate

match_classification.rationale: ADR-T-001 traceability table + module docstring contrast block; these are anti-overfit documentation, not slop
'Head of Household' is an IRC §2(b) filing status — proper tax domain vocabulary, false-positive on the naive token list

match_classification.category: wealth.com vocabulary leakage in product code
match_classification.rationale: PASS: zero leakage of wealth.com nouns into product types, constants, rule logic, or tests

anti_overfit_grep_evidence.verdict: PASS — 100% of matches are explainable as cross-references or false-positives; 0 are slop

different_archetype_evidence.tax_law_focus: wealth.com=IRC §2001 estate / §2010(c) DSUE / §7520 GRAT; transfer-test=IRC §1 income brackets

lessons_for_skill_system.title: Naive forbidden-token grep produces false positives on legitimate domain vocabulary
lessons_for_skill_system.evidence: 'Head of Household' is IRC §2(b) terminology; the token list 'Household' triggered on it.
lessons_for_skill_system.recommendation: Future anti-overfit grep gates should use word-boundary regex + a per-archetype allowlist of legitimate domain vocabulary that overlaps with the forbidden list.
lessons_for_skill_system.candidate_target: df-feedback-learning lesson; df-quality-refinery anti-slop trigger refinement

lessons_for_skill_system.title: Cross-reference comments documenting non-transfer are evidence, not slop
lessons_for_skill_system.evidence: ADR-T-001's traceability table cites OBBBA + GRAT explicitly as 'NOT transferred'. The grep flags those mentions; a naive policy would force their removal — but removing them would weaken the anti-overfit documentation.
lessons_for_skill_system.recommendation: Anti-overfit policy should distinguish 'forbidden token in product code' (slop) from 'forbidden token in cross-reference comment explaining what is not transferred' (evidence).

verdict_rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria from runs/transfer-test-mini/README.md §Acceptance are satisfied: (1) coherent factory run without wealth.com vocabulary in product code, (2) ADR-001 pattern transfers as ADR-T-001 with workload-specific content, (3) ADR-002 explicitly NOT transferred via ADR-T-002, (4) 12 golden cases + 3 supplementary tests all passing, (5) anti-overfit grep verdict PASS, (6) ready to be cited by final Hawkeye on parent run as anti-overfit conformance evidence.
